name: io.github.aks129/healthclaw-guardrails
description: Guardrailed FHIR access for AI agents: 24 tools behind PHI redaction, immutable audit, step-up auth, and tenant isolation. Works with any FHIR server (local store, HAPI, Medplum) and any framework (MCP native, OpenAI/Gemini adapters).

headers.description: Tenant identifier — the public demo tenant 'desktop-demo' works without credentials
headers.name: X-Tenant-Id

headers.description: Tenant-bound HMAC step-up token, required for write-tier tools and non-public tenant reads
headers.name: X-Step-Up-Token
